creator: shanee@rabbit.augusta.de
text:
For the System console options in rc.conf is no part in the
	other rc files. All changes have no effect.

Fix: 

Add the neccessary stuff to rc ...
How-To-Repeat: 
	For example:
	Change keymap="" to keymap="german.iso.kbd" and reboot.
	You have always US keymap ...

	Or moused or any other ...
